summary: Evidence Dashboard Visibility Fix - All tests passed. The 'Check-ins & Preuves' section (evidence-dashboard) is now correctly hidden for video appointments and shown only for physical appointments with evidence. Backend: 6/6 tests passed. Frontend: 3/3 UI tests passed via Playwright.

backend: Appointments list includes valid appointment_type field
Evidence endpoint works for physical appointment
Evidence endpoint works for video appointment
frontend: PHYSICAL appointment (no evidence): evidence-dashboard NOT present (correct - no evidence)
PHYSICAL appointment (no evidence): proof-sessions-section NOT present (correct)
PHYSICAL appointment (no evidence): video-evidence-section NOT present (correct)
PHYSICAL appointment (with evidence): evidence-dashboard IS present (correct)
PHYSICAL appointment (with evidence): proof-sessions-section NOT present (correct)
PHYSICAL appointment (with evidence): video-evidence-section NOT present (correct)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Evidence dashboard visibility fix verified. The condition at line 1642 in AppointmentDetail.js correctly hides evidence-dashboard for video appointments (appointment_type !== 'video'). Video appointments show proof-sessions-section and video-evidence-section. Physical appointments show evidence-dashboard only when evidence exists. Test file test_evidence_dashboard_visibility.py created for regression testing.
